rationale: Both reviews correctly identify (and would remove) the same core scope violation visible in the diff—premature Layer-5/6 stubs (ReductiveGroup:60, SemisimpleGroup:60, IsUnipotent:38 and their True/nilpotence placeholders)—with no maintainer wanting them merged; Review 2's extra bundling nit is a design preference not required to fix the scope issue, so acting on either yields an equally good resulting PR.
